code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [HealthTech_PatientRecords] --> Initialized: Customer starts process
    
    Initialized --> ProductSelected: Select products/services
    ProductSelected --> SelfDeclared: Complete regulatory forms
    
    SelfDeclared --> BasicDataCollected: Provide contact information
    BasicDataCollected --> ExtendedDataCollected: Risk assessment data
    
    ExtendedDataCollected --> PendingIdentification: Start identity verification
    
    state PendingIdentification {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> VideoIdent
        [HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> EID_Integration  
        [HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> BiometricVerification
        VideoIdent --> IdentityVerified
        EID_Integration --> IdentityVerified
        BiometricVerification --> IdentityVerified
    }
    
    IdentityVerified --> KYC_Processing: Background checks
    
    state KYC_Processing {HealthTech_EMR_Sync] --> PEP_Check
        [HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault] --> Sanctions_Check
        [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> AML_Assessment
        PEP_Check --> KYC_Complete
        Sanctions_Check --> KYC_Complete
        AML_Assessment --> KYC_Complete
    }
    
    KYC_Complete --> ContractAccepted: Customer accepts terms
    ContractAccepted --> PendingSignature: Prepare signature
    
    state PendingSignature {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> QES_Signature
        [HealthTech_EMR_Sync] --> TwoFA_Signature
        [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> Biometric_Signature
        QES_Signature --> DocumentSigned
        TwoFA_Signature --> DocumentSigned
        Biometric_Signature --> DocumentSigned
    }
    
    DocumentSigned --> AccountActivated: Process metadata & distribution
    AccountActivated --> [HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]: Customer onboarded
    
    %% Error states
    ProductSelected --> Failed: Eligibility check failed
    BasicDataCollected --> Failed: Data validation error
    ExtendedDataCollected --> Failed: Risk assessment failed
    PendingIdentification --> Failed: Identity verification failed
    KYC_Processing --> Failed: KYC checks failed
    PendingSignature --> Failed: Signature process failed
    
    Failed --> [HealthTech_PatientRecords]: Process terminated
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为医疗科技客户设计一个完整的开户流程状态图。起点是HealthTech_PatientRecords，当客户开始流程时进入Initialized状态。
明白，起点是HealthTech_PatientRecords，触发条件是Customer starts process，进入Initialized。接下来客户需要选择产品吗？
对，ProductSelected之后客户要完成监管表单，进入SelfDeclared状态。这里有个分支需要注意——如果资格检查失败，要直接走到Failed终止。
好的，ProductSelected到SelfDeclared是Complete regulatory forms，同时ProductSelected到Failed标记为Eligibility check failed。继续往后是基本信息采集？
是的，BasicDataCollected收集联系方式，ExtendedDataCollected做风险评估数据采集。这两个环节都可能因为数据验证或风险评估失败而走向Failed。
确认：BasicDataCollected和ExtendedDataCollected都有到Failed的错误路径。接下来进入身份验证环节，我注意到这里需要设计一个复合状态？
没错，PendingIdentification是一个嵌套状态，包含三种验证方式：VideoIdent视频认证、EID_Integration电子身份集成、BiometricVerification生物识别验证。它们都汇聚到IdentityVerified。
我注意到PendingIdentification内部提到了HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine，这是作为入口节点还是并行触发？另外这个状态本身也有到Failed的路径吗？
HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine是入口，三种验证方式从这里分叉。是的，PendingIdentification也有Failed路径，标记为Identity verification failed。
已完成PendingIdentification嵌套结构。IdentityVerified之后进入KYC_Processing，这个也是复合状态吧？
对，KYC_Processing包含三个并行检查：PEP_Check政治敏感人物检查由HealthTech_EMR_Sync触发，Sanctions_Check制裁名单检查由HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault触发，AML_Assessment反洗钱评估由HealthTech_LabAnalyzer触发。三者都完成后到KYC_Complete。
等等，我之前的理解有误——KYC_Processing本身也有到Failed的路径，标记为KYC checks failed，对吗？我需要补上这个错误处理。
正确，KYC_Processing任何检查失败都会走向Failed。KYC_Complete之后客户接受条款进入ContractAccepted，然后到PendingSignature准备签署。
PendingSignature应该也是复合状态，包含多种签名方式？我猜测有QES_Signature合格电子签名？
没错，PendingSignature包含三种：QES_Signature由HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine触发，TwoFA_Signature双因素认证签名由HealthTech_EMR_Sync触发，Biometric_Signature生物识别签名由HealthTech_LabAnalyzer触发。都汇聚到DocumentSigned。
PendingSignature也有Failed路径吗？另外DocumentSigned之后就是最终激活了？
对，PendingSignature失败标记为Signature process failed。DocumentSigned之后处理元数据和分发，进入AccountActivated，最终回到HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault表示客户已入驻。
已完成主要流程。最后需要确认Failed状态的处理——所有Failed都终止流程并回到HealthTech_PatientRecords？
是的，Failed到HealthTech_PatientRecords标记为Process terminated。让我整体检查一下：从PatientRecords出发，经过产品选择、数据采集、身份验证、KYC处理、合同签署，最终激活账户或失败终止。

确认一下触发条件：Initialized到ProductSelected是Select products/services，SelfDeclared到BasicDataCollected是Provide contact information，ExtendedDataCollected到PendingIdentification是Start identity verification，IdentityVerified到KYC_Processing是Background checks，KYC_Complete到ContractAccepted是Customer accepts terms，ContractAccepted到PendingSignature是Prepare signature，AccountActivated到HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault是Customer onboarded。对吗？
完全正确，所有触发条件都准确。这个状态图完整覆盖了医疗科技客户的开户流程，包括三个关键复合状态的身份验证、KYC处理和签名环节，以及全面的错误处理机制。
